title: BOQ Section Grid
description: A spreadsheet-style grid to add, quantify and rate a section's items fast.

steps.title: The grid
steps.description: Rows are items; columns are unit, quantity and rate.
steps.voiceScript: This grid is the fast surface for a section: rows are items, columns price them.
steps.captionText: This grid is the fast surface for a section: rows are items, columns price them.
steps.fallbackMessage: The grid: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Fill quantities and rates
steps.description: Line totals compute as you type.
steps.voiceScript: Fill in quantities and rates. Each line total computes as you type.
steps.captionText: Fill in quantities and rates. Each line total computes as you type.
steps.fallbackMessage: Fill quantities and rates: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Save the grid
steps.description: The section and floor totals update together.
steps.voiceScript: Save the grid. The section and floor totals update together.
steps.captionText: Save the grid. The section and floor totals update together.
steps.fallbackMessage: Save the grid: not visible on this screen yet.
